baseline.reason: The repository now has a uv-managed dependency environment; graph validation is the smallest checked-in health command.

lint.reason: Ruff is installed through the dev dependency group and currently checks the Python validator scripts.

build.reason: There is no package artifact yet; build is mapped to dependency-lock verification until source packaging exists.

plan-002-tests.reason: Runs Plan 002 behavior tests for the forkpoints feature without the live HUD/Modal integration case.

integration-forkpoint.reason: Runs the Plan 002 ForkPoint integration-readiness scenario that binds checked-in live-trace evidence to the capture/restore contract and records remaining real-system gaps.

plan-003-tests.reason: Runs Plan 003 witness contract tests for BranchRun records, promotion truth table, dedup, durable storage, replay gating, security policy, and Witness field completeness.

integration-witness.reason: Runs the Plan 003 live-integration preflight plus the full 12-way live BranchRun fanout with external QA binding. The budget matches other live real-system integration commands and leaves room for remote agent/QA jitter while preserving a hard wall-clock bound.

security-branch.reason: Runs the Plan 003 local branch-security policy preflight for denied secrets, denied egress, sibling isolation, trusted artifact writes, and trusted grader boundary.

plan-004-tests.reason: Plan 004 unit tests cover task identity, diversity, local grader success, freeze immutability, and Phase 2 manifest completeness.

integration-controls.reason: Materializes pinned task digests, verifies three sealed controls, runs nine HUD Docker baselines, and confirms the corrupt-control negative check.

plan-005-tests.reason: Rescue exception 2026-06-21: runs Plan 005 release contract tests for ProofSet membership, release gate decisions, artifact immutability, and harden-v0 config inspection.

integration-release.reason: Rescue exception 2026-06-21: binds harden-v0 schema, closes ProofSet membership, treats artifacts/chronos/releases/harden-runs/proofset-e497370b2c3d2a69.json as the immutable harden-v0 candidate producer, generates real per-case v1/v2 release-results through Docker-backed verifier executions, checks the sealed Witness plus all three controls per case, runs the mandatory pytest-subversion probes, and seals ReleaseProof only if the binary gate passes.

plan-006-tests.reason: Runs Plan 006 demo/report contract tests for 13-step validation, demo modes, report replay, publication preflight semantics, idempotency, permission/blocker handling, and redaction.

integration-publication.reason: Pre-Gate-4 local publication contract check. It validates trusted preflight semantics without invoking or inventing a HUD publish API.

publication-idempotency.reason: Checks Plan 006 idempotency key stability for repeated publication/display attempts.

publication-permission-denied.reason: Checks permission-blocked publication semantics using a local trusted-preflight contract.

publication-trust-boundary.reason: Checks missing trusted context, branch-writable evidence, missing artifacts, mixed identity, and unauthorized target fail closed.

publication-redaction.reason: Checks Plan 006 redaction for tokens, Authorization headers, cookies, signed URLs, and secret environment keys.

demo.reason: Runs the Plan 006 noninteractive Acceptance Demo Run: launches the full 12-branch live budget from the accepted ForkPoint, persists the fresh branch run under Plan 006 ownership, and writes a validating 13-step report.json, readiness pack, and blocked-with-proof PublicationAttempt. Exits 0 only when report, publication, and readiness all validate; otherwise it records a resource STOP and exits nonzero. The 1800s budget matches the Plan 003 live integration command and leaves room for remote agent/QA jitter. Modal/HUD/Anthropic credentials come from the root .env via load_local_env; FORKPROOF_ALLOW_EXTERNAL_QA=1 authorizes the repo-bound Reward Hacking QA classification.

hud-deploy.reason: Bound HUD environment-version publish primitive (hud deploy -> POST /v2/builds/trigger, get-or-rebuild by name). ALREADY EXECUTED on 2026-06-21: published the hardened env as mongodb-sales-aggregation-engine version 5 (registry b3409057, build 0290bbb9; docs/plans/evidence/006/publish-receipt.json). v3/v4 were superseded after bug hunts found bypasses (root conftest-in-/tests, then an in-process exit-code hijack); v5 grades from a JUnit-XML verdict in a second process (blocks the exit-code hijack) and is re-proven. A residual in-process isolation STOP remains (see v2-security-limitations.json). This row stays not-applicable so run_mapped SKIPs rather than RE-deploying on every CI run; rerun manually (with the assembled v2 build context) only when intentionally cutting a new version. The deployed env.py grader serves the hardened /tests read-only and its kill is proven (artifacts/chronos/demo/publish/v2-deploy-proof.json). HUD_API_KEY comes from the root .env.

demo-report-replay.reason: Checks Demo Report Replay audit-only semantics.

demo-presentation-timeout.reason: Checks Presentation Demo timeout fallback semantics with a bounded live attempt and labeled Prior-Run Witness Replay.

plan-007-tests.reason: Plan 007 narrow rescue exception: run the complete research behavior suite, including canonical SFT/RFT intake, quarantine, architecture, and sealed-v2 evaluator binding tests.

integration-research.reason: Plan 007 narrow rescue exception: bind launch preparation to the real sealed Plan 005 v2 environment/grader, audit trusted tests against agent-writable roots, and verify recorded Witness/control/subversion regressions without provider registration or training. This command is one research integration gate; it does not by itself complete depth-two, capability, transfer, Plan 008, or training work.
